## Runtime.Session.ISaveResult.journalRecord property

The full journal record if one was created. Callers can use this to persist the journal via `context.journals.addJournal(record)`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly journalRecord?: IRecipeJournalRecord;
```
